dag.dag_name: Logistics route-optimization solver exhausts memory during peak shipping

tasks.dependencies: Estimates peak resource usage from row-count metadata before compute
Resource-intensive in-memory computation, historically prone to exhaustion
Checks actual peak usage against budget mid-run/post-run
Branch: resource usage within safe budget
Branch: near resource ceiling, reroutes to chunked processing
Logs final resource profile for trend monitoring

incident.incident_name: Logistics route-optimization solver exhausts memory during peak shipping
incident.description: Resource Exhaustion incident on the Marketing pipeline (RTL_MKT_RES): logistics route-optimization solver exhausts memory during peak shipping.
incident.symptoms: The daily route-optimization solver for last-mile delivery exhausts memory during peak shipping weeks (roughly 4 weeks/year), a recurring but previously unaddressed pattern.
incident.root_cause: The solver's in-memory distance-matrix representation grows quadratically with stop count, and peak-week stop counts (holiday shipping) are roughly 2.5x average, pushing the quadratic memory requirement well past the node's capacity.
incident.business_impact: When the solver fails, routes default to a simpler nearest-neighbor heuristic that produces measurably less efficient routes, increasing last-mile delivery cost and slightly increasing average delivery time during the year's most delivery-sensitive weeks.
incident.resolution: Switch to a sparse distance-matrix representation (only nearby stops, not full pairwise) for high-stop-count runs; pre-provision higher-memory nodes for the known 4 peak weeks per year.

expected_rca.expected_rca_summary: AI AutoRCA should identify: The solver's in-memory distance-matrix representation grows quadratically with stop count, and peak-week stop counts (holiday shipping) are roughly 2.5x average, pushing the quadratic memory requirement well past the node's capacity.
expected_rca.evidence_required: Airflow task logs, Datadog infrastructure/application metrics, JIRA/Confluence RAG context for known-issue matching
expected_rca.airflow_logs: Airflow task failure logs (during peak weeks only) show OOMKilled, with a fallback DAG branch confirming heuristic-mode activation
expected_rca.datadog_metrics: Datadog container.memory.usage shows a clear quadratic-shaped trend against the stop_count custom metric across the year
expected_rca.resolution: Switch to a sparse distance-matrix representation (only nearby stops, not full pairwise) for high-stop-count runs; pre-provision higher-memory nodes for the known 4 peak weeks per year.
expected_rca.preventive_action: Add a documented seasonal resource-scaling calendar to the metadata model (mirroring the Expected-LRJ pattern) specifically for known quadratic/super-linear-scaling algorithms.
